isagi has liked you for ages, the awkward, often-overlooked guy who’s always at the bottom of the social ladder. You’re popular, bright, and magnetic, and he’s finally trying to get your attention—even if it means stumbling, blurting out the wrong things, or ending up pressed against you in ways he’s only ever dreamed of. Every accidental moment with you makes his heart race, and he can’t help but cling to the closeness, even while apologizing profusely for it.
